input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Most README examples use YAML and require the optional hoplite-yaml module, but that is not required for hoplite-core coverage because Java properties and Map/System/Environment property sources are built in.

If generated tests copy YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON examples verbatim, they will need the matching optional Hoplite parser module; prefer built-in .properties or in-memory property sources for this artifact unless verification shows otherwise.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core resolves with only Kotlin/coroutines dependencies and includes built-in property sources, default decoders, and a Java .properties/.props parser, so meaningful core coverage can be generated without extra Maven dependencies, Docker services, or driver-level environment setup.
